result.stdout:
Execute script to SQLite database.

Usage: sqlite-exec [options]

Options:
  -f|--file <FILE>          Script file path
  -d|--database <DATABASE>  Get all *.sqlite files from working directory if
                            [database] is not specified.
  -p|--path <PATH>          Get all *.sqlite files from directory.
  -?|-h|--help              Show help information.

commands.payload:
Execute script to SQLite database.

Usage: sqlite-exec [options]

Options:

  -d|--database <DATABASE>  Get all *.sqlite files from working directory if
                            [database] is not specified.
  -p|--path <PATH>          Get all *.sqlite files from directory.
  -?|-h|--help              Show help information.

options.description: Get all *.sqlite files from working directory if [database] is not specified.
